LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeArmorPiercingShells.descr: Combine steel and chemfuel to create armor-piercing shells.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeArmorPiercingShells.label: make armor-piercing shells
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeClusterShells.description: Combine steel and chemfuel to create cluster shells.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeClusterShells.label: make cluster shells
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeDeadlifeShells.descriptio: Use bioferrite to create deadlife shells.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeDeadlifeShells.label: make deadlife shells
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeEMPShells.description: Combine steel and components to create EMP shells.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeEMPShells.label: make EMP shells
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeFirefoamShells.descriptio: Use steel to create firefoam shells.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeFirefoamShells.label: make firefoam shells
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeHighExplosiveShells.descr: Combine steel and chemfuel to create high-explosive shells.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeHighExplosiveShells.label: make high-explosive shells
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeIncendiaryShells.descript: Combine steel and chemfuel to create incendiary shells.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeIncendiaryShells.label: make incendiary shells
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeShrapnelShells.descriptio: Use steel to create shrapnel shells.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeShrapnelShells.label: make shrapnel shells
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeSmokeShells.description: Use steel to create smoke shells.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeSmokeShells.label: make smoke shells
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeTarShells.description: Combine steel and asphalt to create tar shells.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeTarShells.label: make tar shells
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeToxShells.description: Combine steel and chemfuel to create tox shells.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeToxShells.label: make tox shells
